content: Kiera: So, Sabertooth Syd, fancy a bit of chaos with us tonight? MJR’s got his hands full, but I bet we could find something fun to do with the Tommies or maybe even those brainy bunch from Angel. Sabertooth Syd: Kiera, you and your fucking wild ideas. That’s why I stick with you—always something nasty or nasty fucking fun to get into. Just don’t expect me to go easy on any pussies out there just because you want a threesome.

Kiera: Hey, no need to get all dicked up about it, Syd. We just gotta keep things interesting, you know? Can't let those bureaucratic dicks have all the fun. Sabertooth Syd: Haha, you got that right, Kiera. Just remember, when we're fucking around with the establishment, don't expect me to go easy on you either. We're all in this together, whether we like it or not.

Sabertooth Syd: Looks like another night in this shithole city. You think the Gentry will ever let go of their little paradise up in Westminster? Archie: They're nothing but a bunch of decadent cunts, Syd. All they care about is maintaining their power and pleasure. We need someone like Eve Varney to kick their arses and bring order to this mess. And besides, after last night, the only pleasure I care about is with MJR. Fucking him is all I can think about.

Archie: Yeah, well, let's just hope MJR keeps those sexy raider bitches away from him. God, I can't wait to get my hands on him again. Sabertooth Syd: Just stay sharp, girl. This city ain't gonna change overnight. And you sure as hell don't want to end up as some feral ghoul's bitch.
